summary: Completed testing of iteration 4 features. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), but critical frontend routing issue persists from iteration 3. Admin login still redirects to user dashboard instead of admin dashboard, preventing access to bulk actions and CSV export features.

ui_bugs.issue: Login button uses blue color (#002FA7) instead of teal (#114f55)
Registration button uses blue color (#002FA7) instead of teal (#114f55)

integration_issues.issue: Admin login redirects to /dashboard instead of /admin - CRITICAL routing bug persists
integration_issues.details: Admin users cannot access admin dashboard with Users tab, bulk actions, and CSV export. Manual navigation to /admin also redirects to /dashboard.

design_issues.details: Auth pages still use blue (#002FA7) instead of teal (#114f55)

passed_tests: Backend API: Admin login authentication (100% success)
Backend API: User registration and login
Backend API: Admin bulk role update
Backend API: All auth endpoints working
Backend API: Steps, partners, CMS endpoints
Frontend: Landing page loads with teal color scheme (10 elements found)
Frontend: User dashboard shows stepper/progress elements
Frontend: User dashboard displays teal color scheme
Frontend: Admin user authentication working (shows 'Welcome, Admin')

critical_fixes: Fix admin dashboard routing - admin users are redirected to /dashboard instead of /admin. This prevents access to Users tab with checkboxes, bulk actions, and CSV export functionality.
Investigate ProtectedRoute logic or AuthContext to ensure admin role routing works correctly
Update Auth.js login/registration buttons to use teal color (#114f55) instead of blue (#002FA7)
testing_needed: Verify admin login redirects to /admin dashboard
Test admin dashboard Users tab with checkboxes and bulk actions
Test CSV export functionality from admin dashboard
Test user notification preferences panel (currently blocked by routing issues)
Verify consistent teal color scheme across all UI elements
investigation_required: Check why admin users are forced to user dashboard despite correct login logic in Auth.js
Verify ProtectedRoute component logic for admin role handling
Check if there are any redirect loops or conflicting route guards
